calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica F. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Bersamin, #11722.

R. Stephen M. LaRoe, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Tastemakers International, Inc., a California corporation, and with plaintiff M. Johanna Lopez, an individual.
Ms. Lopez was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant PHLO corporation, a Delaware corporation.
Dismissals without prejudice were entered against defendants Anne P. Hovis, an individual, and James B. Hovis, an individual, on October 22, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 22, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Tastemakers International, Inc., a California corporation and M. Johanna Lopez, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendant PHLO corporation, a Delaware corporation as follows:

Damages/Principal - $38,807.63.
Prejudgment Interest - $7,431.77.
Attorney's Fees - $5,675.00.
Costs - $371.66, for a total judgment in the amount of $52,286.06.

Counsel for plaintiffs shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court by 5:00 p.m. today, July 1, 2010.
